title: Mutliplayer?
author: Brennan Hatton
variants:
Welcome Abord Adventurer!
Joined a world hey! Thats exciting.

Explore together, connect with the train together!

With more people around, the train is sure to grow!

Do you think we will get more train carts?

Hey, you did it! You joined a new world!
A new train!
Welcome to the Dungoen Train!

What is the dungoen train?
Why is it here?
What will you find?

Good luck!

You did it! You joined a new world!
You joined the Dungeon Train!

Mutliplayer,
Mutliple people, in a single world!
Together.

What a technology!
Computers, connecting.
People interacting,
on a train
in your compuyter
on the internet!
